articles.title_en: "Opora Rossii" proposed allowing pawnshops to accept cryptocurrency as collateral

articles.title_en: "Avtostat": the average price of a new car in Russia has tripled in 12 years
articles.lead_en: According to the head of the agency, Sergei Tselikov, an active rise in prices began in 2015 against the backdrop of sanctions and devaluation of the ruble.

articles.title_en: Report: Abramovich tied to Russian payment platform created to evade sanctions, serving drone makers
articles.lead_en: Russian billionaires Roman Abramovich and Viktor Kharitonin may be tied to A7, a payment platform created in 2024 to help Russia move money across borders in defiance of Western sanctions — and which has itself been placed under sanctions. That is the finding of an investigation by the independent Russian investigative outlet Proekt, whose sources describe A7 as the dominant player in the cross-border payments market.
articles.title_raw: Report: Abramovich tied to Russian payment platform created to evade sanctions, serving drone makers
articles.lead_raw: Russian billionaires Roman Abramovich and Viktor Kharitonin may be tied to A7, a payment platform created in 2024 to help Russia move money across borders in defiance of Western sanctions — and which has itself been placed under sanctions. articles.title_en: VTB noted a decrease in investment activity of business in the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: The number of requests from entrepreneurs for loans to sell deposits has decreased by 30-40% over the year, said Ivan Rozinsky, head of the regional business lending department - senior vice president of the bank.

articles.title_en: The West is losing ground: Oreshkin on the BRICS breakthrough and the reverse effect of sanctions against Russia
articles.lead_en: The “sluggish machine of Western finance” is becoming more and more gluttonous: G7 members are losing ground, and the BRICS countries are beginning to “aggressively dominate” the global economic structure. China, India and Russia are in the top five.
articles.title_raw: Запад теряет позиции: Орешкин о рывке БРИКС и обратном эффекте санкций против России
articles.lead_raw: "Неповоротливая машина западных финансов" становится все "прожорливей": члены G7 теряют позиции, а страны БРИКС начинают "агрессивно доминировать" в глобальной экономической структуре. Китай, Индия и Россия находятся в пятерке лидеров.
